paper.title: VSRNet: End-to-end video segment retrieval with text query
paper.authors: Xiao Sun, Xiang Long, Dongliang He, Shilei Wen, Zhouhui Lian
paper.from_query: semantic video retrieval AND action recognition AND natural language query

llm_screening.Notes: Proposes an end-to-end method for video segment retrieval based on text queries
llm_screening.Reason of relevance: Addresses task relevant area and supports natural language queries
Top evidence: 'End-to-end video segment retrieval with text query'
